name: The World According to Jeff Goldblum
original_name: The World According to Jeff Goldblum
overview: Through the prism of Jeff Goldblum's always inquisitive and highly entertaining mind, nothing is as it seems. Each episode is centered around something we all love — like sneakers or ice cream — as Jeff pulls the thread on these deceptively familiar objects and unravels a wonderful world of astonishing connections, fascinating science and history, amazing people, and a whole lot of surprising big ideas and insights.

trailers.title: The World According to Jeff Goldblum Official Trailer - D23 2019
